description: The HomeLocationSetter component's handleSetLocation function lacks error handling for the saveMutation call. If the mutation fails after geolocation succeeds, the loading state is already false and the user gets no feedback. Wrap the mutation in a try/catch or handle mutation errors properly.
successCriteria: The mutation error state is checked and loading is set to false on mutation completion
User receives appropriate feedback if location save fails after geolocation succeeds
